description: Run three simulation scenarios (0%, 25%, and 75% navigation app penetration) on the Bologna Pasubio network (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg) using SUMO's dynamic rerouting device. For the 25% scenario, use a rerouting probability of 0.25 and a period of 30 seconds. For the 75% scenario, use a rerouting probability of 0.75 and a period of 30 seconds. Save the tripinfo outputs to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo_0.xml, /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo_25.xml, and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo_75.xml. Generate a summary report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/penetration_report.csv containing the calculated average trip duration for each scenario (rounded to two decimal places) using the headers: Penetration,AvgDuration.
